headline: Logitech’s new Mobi Fold squeezes a lot of functionality into a tiny folding mouse
summary: Logitech launched its new Mobi Fold, an ultraportable travel mouse. It features a unique folding design, pivoting 130 degrees for compact storage. The Mobi Fold costs $79.99 and comes in multiple color options.

headline: I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works
summary: The new Siri AI can now easily add event lists from emails or flyers to calendars. This feature is particularly beneficial for parents managing busy schedules. It marks a significant improvement in Siri's practical AI capabilities.

headline: Congress just gave DHS another $70 billion
summary: Congress approved $70 billion in funding for the Department of Homeland Security. The vote was narrow and largely along party lines. This funding supports President Trump's mass deportation agenda over three years.

headline: The App Store is going to add subscription bundles soon
summary: Apple will introduce subscription bundles for iPhone apps later this year. These bundles will allow offers from different companies to be combined. The feature is similar to existing streaming video bundles, but for various app subscriptions.

headline: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave Sets Standard Physical Price at $80
summary: The launch date for Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave has been revealed. The game's standard physical edition will cost $80 USD. This sets a new price point for the anticipated title.

headline: Xbox Will 'Try and Do More' Exclusives Once the 'Business is Healthy', Says Asha Sharma
summary: Xbox plans to increase its number of exclusive titles in the future. This push for exclusives is conditional on the business becoming 'healthy'. Asha Sharma confirmed Xbox's future strategy regarding exclusive games.

headline: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave — Here's What Comes With Each Edition
summary: Details for Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave editions have been released. Information on what comes with each version is now available. This helps players choose their preferred game package.

headline: Treat Dad to a Brand New Pair of Apple AirPods Pro 3 Earbuds for Father's Day, Now 20% Off at Amazon
summary: Apple AirPods Pro 3 earbuds are currently 20% off on Amazon. This Father's Day deal makes them a great gift option. They are highlighted as the best noise-canceling earbuds for iPhone users.

headline: Watch: Residents flee as cars and houses burn in Belfast
summary: Residents in Belfast are evacuating amidst widespread disorder. Cars and houses are burning following a knife attack incident. Police and firefighters are assisting families to safety.

headline: Illegal mini-marts to shut for up to 12 months under law change prompted by BBC
summary: A new law will allow illegal mini-marts to be closed for up to 12 months. Current rules limit closures to six months in England and Wales. This change was prompted by investigations from the BBC.

headline: US strikes Iran in response to downing of military helicopter
summary: The US launched strikes against Iran after a military helicopter was shot down. President Trump accused Iran of downing the US helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz. The strikes fulfill Trump's vow to respond to the incident.

headline: Bowen: Trump and Netanyahu wanted to reshape the Middle East - now they risk a permacrisis
summary: Trump and Netanyahu aimed to reshape the Middle East's geopolitical landscape. Their actions are now risking a state of 'permacrisis' in the region. The leaders are accused of miscalculating the consequences of the Iran war.
